response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial routing pipelines, despite having broad full-stack exposure; their geospatial work is in DLang and Node.js, not the required systems for routing tiling, and there is no evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or navigation data optimization at scale.
strengths: Strong full-stack adaptability across languages and domains
Proven track record in building data-intensive systems and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation systems
Geospatial work uses DLang/Node.js, not the required low-latency C++/Rust pipelines
Lacks evidence of distributed systems, consistency models, or real-time traffic integration
